UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONG, XIAO HONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, GARY L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 601 VAN NESS AVENUE, APT 48 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAHAM, GARY L.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONG, XIAO HONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, GARY L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $3,900.00 RENT, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $805.00 COSTS, $5,330.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,360.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT*** PLACE IN PICK-UP BOX NO SASE****
